title: The Mortis Dimension
description: A mod that adds a new dimension you must escape from after you die. You will face terrifying beasts, go on grand adventures, and see amazing sights
body:
If you are looking for a mod that increases the difficulty of your game without having to put it in hardcore? Then look no further! Mortis is a new dimension that you enter upon death. to escape you must defeat the new boss called The Umbra Lich. The mod adds several new mobs and items. Will you be able to cheat death or will you be trapped in a dark deadly world FOREVER?!
THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB AND CURIOS API TO WORK AND IT IS NOT COMPATIBLE WITH THE OCULUS GECOLIB COMPACT
ENJOY!!! :)

UPDATE 1.2.1 CREEPY CRUNCHING!
